theme_and_archetype.description: A grounding, warm, and highly legible interface for gig economy delivery riders. Uses terracotta/orange tones mimicking delivery apps, but paired with natural moss greens and sand colors to communicate financial safety, insurance protection, and organic growth (rewards).

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid: Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Use gap-6. Children should have h-full to prevent jagged bottoms.

surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Flat white background (bg-white), 1px solid border (border-[#E3DFD8]), NO default shadow. On hover: shadow-lg shadow-[#EBE8E3] and -translate-y-0.5 transition-transform.
surface_strategies.glass_header: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E3DFD8] z-50 sticky top-0
surface_strategies.reward_wallet_card: Use a subtle gradient background: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#F9F8F6] to-[#EBE8E3] with a terracotta primary accent text.

components.buttons: Shadcn Button. Primary uses #D95D39. Fully rounded (rounded-full) for primary actions, rounded-lg for secondary. Must have hover states and focus rings.
components.sliders: Shadcn Slider for Simulation Mode. Track color #D95D39 for temperature/traffic, #2D6A85 for rain.
components.tabs: Shadcn Tabs. Underline or pill style, not bulky boxes. Use for 'Dashboard | Simulation | Subscriptions'.
components.badges: Pill-shaped (rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold). Color codes based on status (safe=green, warning=orange, danger=red).
components.charts: Recharts. Use simple line charts for Earnings & Payout timeline. Remove thick grid lines, use thin dotted #E3DFD8. Line stroke #D95D39.
components.icons: lucide-react. Stroke width 2. Uses #D95D39 for primary interactions.

page_specific_instructions.Login_Register: Split screen: Left side form, Right side image (media.hero_rider). Clean typography.
page_specific_instructions.Subscription_Page: Pricing cards with 'Dynamic Premium' badge. Show tier features clearly.
page_specific_instructions.Rider_Dashboard: Bento grid layout. Cards for: Policy Status (Active/Inactive), Risk & Severity (Current levels), Earnings & Payouts (Chart), Reward Wallet.
page_specific_instructions.Simulation_Mode: A dedicated panel or modal with 3 sliders: Rain Intensity, Traffic Congestion, Temperature. Moving sliders dynamically updates a 'Risk Score' and 'Auto Status/Processing Pipeline' view.
page_specific_instructions.Reward_Wallet: Show large Coin balance with a gold/yellow icon. List recent 'Reward History' below it.

motion_and_interactions.list_entrance: Framer motion staggered fade-in up (y: 20 -> 0, opacity: 0 -> 1)
motion_and_interactions.coin_earn: Scale pop animation when coins are added.

hero_rider.description: Rider on motorcycle, used for hero section, login background, or profile banner.

risk_rain.description: Heavy rain and traffic in a city, used in the simulation mode background or risk panel visual.

traffic_city.description: Motorcyclists navigating busy city street, used to represent traffic conditions in simulation.

testing_attributes.guideline: CRITICAL: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid.
